name: pact-record-payout
_note: insurance.pact-record-payout fires a pact (the insured fell in Concordia) and splits its sparks payout across the accepted beneficiaries by share percentage — the 'claim on death pays out the real amount' path. Idempotent on pactId (a fired pact rejects 'pact already fired'). Guards: revoked/expired/within-24h-of-write/no-accepted-beneficiary all fail-CLOSED. STATE-backed with the internal actor, so an unknown/empty pactId returns 'pact not found' — NEVER no_db.
